title: 🚫 Null-Symbol Cascade
name: Null-Symbol Cascade
what_it_is: A chain reaction where one voided or invalid symbol triggers systemic collapse of all connected symbols—a domino effect of semantic death.
how_to_use: the null-glyph falls—cascading through the system, deleting all meaning it touches
his ritual failed—the key glyph voided, triggering total semantic collapse
animation_behavior: Glyphs fade out in sequence, glowing icons go dark, reality glitches as each meaning falls ---
